evals.prompt: Generate the consensus extraction and provider comparison reports for the AutoShow OCR run at runs/demo/.
evals.expected_output: The skill builds a consensus evidence packet, writes consensus-extraction.txt in plain text, then generates provider-comparison-report.md and provider-comparison-report.json.
assertions: consensus-extraction.txt exists and is plain text without markdown formatting
provider-comparison-report.md exists and contains ranking tables for local and cloud groups
provider-comparison-report.json exists and is valid JSON with local and cloud keys
The report provider count matches the number of providers/*/result.json directories
consensus-extraction.txt does not contain commentary, notes, or section headings
provider-comparison-report.md contains an Overall Ranking section with best overall and worst overall notes
provider-comparison-report.md contains a Tier Breakdown section
provider-comparison-report.json has overallMetric, overallWeights, overall.count, tierMetric, tierSplit, tiers, and provider overallComponents fields

evals.prompt: Run the OCR consensus skill against a run where one provider directory exists but has no result.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill handles the missing result.json gracefully, warns about it, and evaluates remaining providers.
assertions: A warning is emitted about the missing result.json
The remaining providers are still scored and ranked
Reports are generated successfully despite the missing provider

evals.prompt: Generate comparison reports for an OCR run with both local (tesseract) and cloud (mistral, openai) providers.
evals.expected_output: The reports separate local and cloud providers into independent ranking groups.
assertions: provider-comparison-report.md has separate Local Models and Cloud Services sections
provider-comparison-report.json has local and cloud top-level keys
Local providers are not ranked against cloud providers
Local provider table does not include a Cost column
The combined overall leaderboard ranks local and cloud providers together without changing local/cloud accuracy rankings
Every provider in the combined overall leaderboard has an overallTier of 1, 2, or 3
